name: C-10 --section freshness-badge --freshness-file bundles the freshness state per the architecture three-freshness sections + all-three-fresh badge
command: printf '%s' '{"standards":"fresh","pr_corpus":"fresh","compliance":"fresh"}' > f.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --section freshness-badge --emit p.json --freshness-file f.json --commit-sha abc --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && [ -s p.json ] && echo bundled 1>&2
